# EasyPay

> Mobile financial services for Bangladesh — send money, pay bills, cash out, shop online, and manage your wallet securely.

EasyPay is a digital wallet and e-commerce platform built for Bangladesh. It offers peer-to-peer money transfers, mobile recharges, bill payments, agent cash-in / cash-out, merchant QR payments, gift cards, savings, loans (Qard Hasan), insurance, and an integrated online shop.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the EasyPay wallet, balance, and quick actions.
- [Shop](/shop): Browse products from verified vendors across Bangladesh.
- [Pay](/pay): Pay merchants by QR code, phone number, or wallet ID.
- [Gift Cards](/giftcards): Buy gift cards across 17 categories.
- [Coupons](/coupons): Available promotions and discount codes.
- [Loan](/loan): Sharia-compliant Qard Hasan micro-loans.
- [Insurance](/insurance): Micro-insurance plans.
- [Donations](/donations): Donate to verified causes.
- [Careers](/careers): Open roles at EasyPay.
- [Developer Portal](/developers): API keys, webhooks, and SDK docs.
- [Install App](/install): Install the EasyPay PWA for any role.

## Optional

- [Merchant Support](/merchant-support): Help center for merchants.
